I shipped the original Phosak dress to the customer. However, the order was returned as an RTO (Return to Origin). When I received the return, I found that my original dress had been replaced with an old shirt. I visited the warehouse and checked the CCTV/video footage. The video clearly shows that the correct product was dispatched from the warehouse. This means the product was tampered with and replaced during the return process, after it left the warehouse. I request you to investigate this

Meesho has one of the most irresponsible delivery services I have ever experienced. Your promised delivery dates seem to mean nothing. Instead of delivering orders on time, you only send delay notifications and endless excuses. If you can't keep your commitments, stop misleading customers with false delivery promises. This is not customer service—it's complete negligence. Respect your customers' time instead of making them wait without answers. Very disappointing and unprofessional.

I have been using Meesho for a long time and my experience has been very good. The app is easy to use and there are many products available at affordable prices. Delivery is usually on time and most products arrive as shown in the pictures. The return and refund process is also simple, which makes shopping stress-free. I like that there are options for every budget and new offers keep coming regularly. Customer support is also helpful whenever needed. Overall, it is a good.
